articles.title: OBSERVABILITY FOR AGENTIC AI AND LLMS: 6 RECOMMENDATIONS
articles.summary: Agentic AI and GenAI are powerful but unpredictable. It's not just hallucination - they regularly take entirely new paths through established workflows.

articles.title: catch critical issues early. Read the report
articles.summary: Want to check it out firsthand? Experiment with AI observability tools in the Dynatrace Playground [5] - where you can explore sample data without installing any software.

articles.title: OPENAI TESTING NEW IMAGE-2 MODELS ON LM ARENA
articles.summary: OpenAI is preparing to roll out its next generation of image generation models along with GPT-5.2. Two new models have appeared on online evaluation platforms. Early testers note a substantial increase in image detail and fidelity. The upgrade brings OpenAI's image generation closer to the standard set by Google Nano Banana 2. Examples of images generated with the models are available in the article.

articles.title: GLM-4.6V: OPEN SOURCE MULTIMODAL MODELS WITH NATIVE TOOL USE
articles.summary: GLM-4.6V (106B), a foundation model designed for cloud and high-performance cluster scenarios, and GLM-4.6V-Flash (9B), a lightweight model optimized for local deployment and low-latency applications, have been open-sourced. GLM-4.6V scales its context window to 128k tokens in training. It achieves SoTA performance in visual understanding and reasoning among models of similar parameter scales. The model has native Function Calling capabilities.

articles.title: INTRODUCING DEVSTRAL2 AND MISTRAL VIBE CLI
articles.summary: Devstral 2 hits 72.2% on SWE-bench Verified with 123B parameters, making it one of the best open-weight coding models despite being a fraction of the size of its peers. The 24B Devstral Small 2 scores 68.0% and runs on consumer hardware. Mistral also launched Vibe CLI, an open-source terminal agent that orchestrates multi-file changes across codebases.

articles.title: HOW PEOPLE USE AI AT WORK
articles.summary: Professionals use AI for grunt work and first drafts. It is never trusted without supervision. Artists use AI to handle admin work so they have more time for creative work. Researchers find that the time required to fact-check AI output often negates the efficiency gains. The primary barrier to AI adoption is hallucination.

articles.title: 2025: THE STATE OF GENERATIVE AI IN THE ENTERPRISE
articles.summary: The shift to enterprise AI is no longer speculative. Enterprise AI is now a $37 billion market. It is the fastest-scaling category in software history. AI is becoming the core of how work gets done across industries, and enterprises, seeing real returns, are doubling down.

articles.title: THERE IS NO DATA-GENERATING DISTRIBUTION
articles.summary: The data-generating distribution is a convenient mnemonic crutch for machine learning engineers. However, it isn't necessary for understanding machine learning. The same methods are used regardless of whether the world is producing randomness. We need to figure out when we actually need statistical models of data.

articles.title: HOW PEOPLE USE AI AGENTS
articles.summary: A large-scale usage study from Perplexity and Harvard reveals that over half of AI agent tasks involve deep cognitive work like research and productivity, challenging the stereotype of agents as simple task-doers.

articles.title: PRACTITIONER'S GUIDE TO REINFORCEMENT LEARNING, FROM WEIGHTS & BIASES
articles.summary: RL has been touted as the direct path to AGI, while others dismiss it as a dead end. Learn how and when RL works best [13], where SFT, LoRA, and GRPO fit in, and about the benefits of new Serverless RL from Weights & Biases. Get the guide here [13].

articles.title: ALPHAEVOLVE ON GOOGLE CLOUD: AI FOR AGENTIC DISCOVERY AND OPTIMIZATION
articles.summary: AlphaEvolve, now on Google Cloud in private preview, leverages Gemini models to optimize complex problems by evolving algorithms through mutation and evaluation. The technology has improved data center efficiency, reduced Gemini's training time, and accelerated TPU design at Google. Various industries, including biotech and logistics, can use it to solve proprietary optimization challenges.

articles.title: REFERENCE-TO-VIDEO GENERATION
articles.summary: Saber is a zero-shot video generation framework that creates identity-consistent videos from reference images and text prompts, trained only on video-text pairs. It avoids costly triplet data by using masked video frames and custom attention to learn identity features.

articles.title: REASONING WITH SAMPLING: YOUR BASE MODEL IS SMARTER THAN YOU THINK
articles.summary: Reasoning skills unlocked by reinforcement learning may already exist in base models. Harvard researchers propose "power sampling," which biases generation toward tokens with high-likelihood completions rather than tokens with many mediocre completions.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC AND ACCENTURE EXPAND ENTERPRISE AI PARTNERSHIP
articles.summary: Anthropic and Accenture launched a dedicated business group to accelerate enterprise AI deployment using Claude. With 30,000 professionals trained on Claude and solutions targeting regulated industries, the partnership aims to move companies from pilot projects to full-scale production.

articles.title: MCP DONATED TO AGENTIC AI FOUNDATION
articles.summary: Anthropic has donated the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to the new Agentic AI Foundation under the Linux Foundation. MCP has become a widely adopted interoperability standard across AI platforms and infrastructure. It is supported by major industry players like AWS, Google, and Microsoft.

articles.title: LOOKING FOR A PRACTICAL AI WORKFLOW FOR PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT? WATCH MIRO'S 3-PART MASTERCLASS
articles.summary: Learn about ROI models, implementations steps, and AI prototyping vs traditional design tools. Each session includes practical frameworks,

articles.title: and 25 minutes of Q&A. Watch all three sessions, free
UNCONVENTIONAL AI CONFIRMS ITS MASSIVE $475M SEED ROUND
articles.summary: Naveen Rao, who sold MosaicML to Databricks for $1.3B, is building energy-efficient AI hardware with the goal of matching biological efficiency.

articles.title: CEOS ARE ALL-IN ON AI
articles.summary: CEOs are bullish on the broad economic impact of AI, but they also expect it to weaken the job market.

articles.title: OPENAI HIRES SLACK CEO AS NEW CHIEF REVENUE OFFICER
articles.summary: Denise Dresser is leaving Slack after 14 years at Salesforce to head OpenAI's enterprise unit.

articles.title: THE ABUNDANCE PARADOX AND AI'S IMPACT ON IP VALUE
articles.summary: Netflix's 82B purchase of Warner Bros. underscores how iconic IP gains value as AI drives content production costs toward zero.
